assistant.title: vecini.online Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask me about the app
assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm the app assistant. I can help you find a feature or learn how something works. Pick a topic or type a question.
assistant.noMatch: I couldn't find a confident answer for that. I can only answer about app features you have access to. Try one of the suggestions or rephrase your question.
assistant.disclaimer: I only answer from in-app information visible to you.

greeting: Hello! Tell me what you're looking for.
Hi there! Ask me anything about the app.
identity: I'm the vecini.online assistant. I help you find information and features in the app.
I'm the app assistant — I answer from information inside vecini.online.
capabilities: I help you find features and information in the app: issues, votes, bookings, contacts and more. Pick a topic or type a question.
I can show you how the app works and where to find things. Try a topic below.
affirm: Tell me what you're looking for and I'll point you there.
Sure — which feature do you want to know about?

clarifyVariants: Did you mean one of these?
fallbackVariants: Hmm, I'm not sure I understood. I can help with the app's features and info — try one of the suggestions.
I couldn't find an answer for that. I only answer about the app; maybe one of these?
I'm not sure what you mean. Rephrase, or pick a topic below.
quickPrompts: How do I report a problem?

help.a: I can help you find the app's features and understand how to use them: announcements, votes, issues, bookings, documents and much more. Tell me what you're looking for or pick a topic below.

cota-parte.a: The cotă-parte (indivisible share) is the percentage of common property (stairwells, roof, façade) that belongs to your apartment, usually based on usable area. It sets the weight of your vote and how some costs are split. Full definitions are in the Glossary.

fond-reparatii.q: What is the repair fund for?
fond-reparatii.a: The repair fund is the amount collected monthly for future major works (roof, façade, installations). It is established by a General Assembly decision. You can estimate a recommended monthly rate in the dedicated section.

cvorum.a: Quorum is the minimum number of owners (or shares) that must take part for a vote to be valid. Each proposal has its own quorum and majority threshold. The terms are explained in the Glossary.

common.tagline: The digital platform for your homeowners' association
common.slowConnection: The connection seems slow. Check your internet.
common.errorBody: Try again or contact your administrator.
common.loadError: The data could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
common.notImplemented: This feature is registered but its page is not available in this build.
common.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled for your association.
common.featureDisabledHint: Only your association's admin can enable this module.
common.featureUnauthorized: This feature is not available for your role.
common.requestFeatureConfirm: The admin has been notified that you need this module.
common.requestFeatureToast: We have sent your activation request to the admin.
common.requestFeatureAlreadyToast: You have already requested this module.

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with letters and digits or symbols.
auth.rememberMe: Keep me signed in on this device
auth.idleSignedOut: You were signed out for security after a period of inactivity.
auth.forgotHint: We will email you a reset link.
auth.verifyBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account.
auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, you will receive a password reset link.
auth.newPasswordHint: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetExpiredBody: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
auth.noAsociatie: You don't have an association configured yet.
auth.noValidInvite: No valid invitation. Contact the platform team.
auth.demoMode: Demo mode — no backend configured. Displayed data is sample data.
auth.lockout: Too many failed attempts. Your account is temporarily locked. Try again in about {{minutes}} min.
auth.mfaLockout: Too many incorrect codes. Verification is temporarily locked. Try again in about {{minutes}} min.

err.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email address before signing in.
err.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
err.weakPassword: This password is too weak. Choose a stronger one.
err.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
err.samePassword: The new password must differ from the old one.
err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pwd.tooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
pwd.tooLong: Password is too long (72 characters maximum).
pwd.noVariety: Mix letters with digits or symbols.
pwd.breached: This password appears in known breach lists. Choose another.
pwd.containsEmail: Your password must not contain your email address.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.body: You can sign out of every device at once. Useful if you lost a device or suspect unauthorised access.
sessions.confirmBody: Every session for your account will be closed, including this one. You will need to sign in again.

audit.title: Recent security activity
audit.body: Security events for your account. They never contain passwords, codes, or full email addresses.

event.loginLocked: Account temporarily locked after too many attempts
event.mfaChallengeLocked: Two-step verification temporarily locked after too many attempts

mfa.subtitle: Add a second authentication factor to protect your account.
mfa.intro: Two-factor authentication asks for a code from an authenticator app at every sign-in, in addition to your password.
mfa.statusOnBody: Your account is protected with an extra code at sign-in.
mfa.requiredNotice: Your role manages association data and funds, so two-factor authentication is mandatory. Turn it on to continue.
mfa.step1: 1. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
mfa.step2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code the app shows to confirm.
mfa.manualHint: Can't scan? Add a new entry manually in your authenticator app using the key below.
mfa.disableWarn: Your account will be protected by your password only. You can re-enable it any time.
mfa.disableWarnRequired: Your role requires two-factor authentication. If you disable it, you will have to set it up again before using the app.
mfa.recoveryBody: Keep these codes somewhere safe. Each code can be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app.
mfa.challengeBody: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
mfa.challengeHint: A 6-digit code or a recovery code.
mfa.stepUpBody: This session hasn't passed two-step verification yet. Enter a code to reach the rest of the app.

err.expiredCode: This code has expired. Request a new one.
err.noChannel: This channel is not enabled. Enable it from Security settings.
err.deliveryFailed: The code could not be delivered. Please try again.
err.channelLocked: This channel is temporarily locked after too many attempts.
err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

channels.title: Second-factor channels
channels.body: Get a one-time code by email or Telegram instead of from an authenticator app.
channels.choosePicker: Choose how to receive your code
channels.otpHint: 6-digit code from your email or Telegram.
channels.resent: A new code has been sent.

confirm2fa.successBody: Your identity has been verified. Continue to the app.
confirm2fa.expiredBody: This confirmation link has expired (links are valid for 10 minutes).
confirm2fa.notFoundBody: This link is not valid or has already been used.
confirm2fa.deviceNote: This happens when the link is opened on a different device than the one you signed in from. Please return to the sign-in page and enter the code manually.

home.editHint: Show or hide cards, reorder them by dragging or with the arrows, and choose each card's size. Changes save automatically.
home.allHiddenBody: You have hidden every card. Tap "Customize" to bring back the features you care about.

onboarding.title: Association setup
onboarding.name: Association name
onboarding.selectFeatures: Choose the features to enable. You can change these anytime.
onboarding.finishHint: Association configured. You can now import your apartment list and send invite emails.

welcome.slide1Title: Your whole building, in one calm place
welcome.slide1Body: Announcements, events and neighbourly chat: everything from the association reaches you, without the noise of group chats.
welcome.slide2Body: Vote on proposals, read the documents and see what was decided, all transparent and on the record.
welcome.slide3Body: Find each other in the directory, lend a hand or a tool, and keep the building safe together.
welcome.profileSubtitle: Add a few details so your neighbours and committee know who you are. You can change anything later.

recurring.suggestion_structural: The frequency and severity point to a root cause — worth a structural fix rather than repeated patch-ups.
recurring.suggestion_maintenance: Looks like routine upkeep — keep it on the periodic maintenance list.
recurring.empty: No recurring issues yet. Patterns show up here when the same ticket repeats in the same place.

fileStorage.unavailableUnconfigured: File uploads need a configured storage backend. Running in offline/demo mode, so uploads are disabled.

repairfund.title: Repair fund

repairfund.invalid: Fill in the building details to see a recommendation.
repairfund.rationale: Base {{base}} + age {{age}} + overdue works {{works}} lei/m². Guidance for the AGA discussion, not a legal requirement.

psi.title: Fire-safety (PSI) checks

anonymous.privacyNote: Your identity stays hidden from the committee. Only the platform admin can de-anonymize it, with an audit-log entry.
anonymous.pendingBanner: {{count}} messages are awaiting a committee response.

rfp.title: Request for proposals
rfp.subtitle: Post a request for proposals, collect contractor quotes and pick the winning one transparently.

adminChat.messageHintAdmin: Write your message to the resident.
adminChat.privacyNote: This conversation is private between you and the administrator, and the committee cannot see it.
adminChat.adminPrivacyNote: This conversation is private between you and the chosen resident. Other residents cannot see it.
adminChat.writeFailed: Message could not be saved. Please try again.
adminChat.noLinkedResident: This apartment has no linked resident account yet. Wait for the resident to sign up before starting a conversation.
adminChat.empty: No conversations yet. Start one with the button above.
adminChat.emptyAdmin: No messages from residents yet. You can start a conversation with the button above.

welcomeKit.title: Welcome kit
welcomeKit.subtitle: The essential steps for new residents. Check them off one by one to settle into building life quickly.
welcomeKit.stepBodyHint: Briefly explain what the resident should do.
welcomeKit.allDone: Well done! You've completed the whole welcome kit.
welcomeKit.empty: No steps in the kit yet. Add the first one with the button above.

kids.title: Children & teens activities
kids.subtitle: Coordinate playground meetups and activities for the building's children. Ages are shown by group, never by name.
kids.registryHint: How many children live in the building, by age group. Only counts are shown — no names.
kids.registryEmpty: No children registered yet. Be the first to add yours, privacy preserved.
kids.registerHint: Tell us how many children you have per age group. No names — just a count.
kids.totalKids: {{count}} children in the building in total
kids.eventsEmpty: No activities planned. Propose the first with the button above.
kids.noteHint: What to bring, what we'll do, how we confirm.

projects.title: Project tracker
projects.subtitle: Status of major works: phases, progress and budget allocated vs spent, transparent for every resident.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Add the first with the button above.

photoJournal.title: Project photo journal
photoJournal.subtitle: Follow works in progress through a chronological photo journal. Less gossip, more transparency.
photoJournal.empty: No photos in the journal yet. Add the first with the button above.
photoJournal.caption: Caption
photoJournal.demoNote: In demo mode the photo is shown as a colored background — the caption and date carry the story.

safety.title: Safety code
safety.subtitle: A passphrase against phone scams and a private list of trusted people. Especially useful for elderly residents.
safety.privacyNote: Only you can see this. It is stored encrypted and is not visible to the committee or other neighbours.
safety.passphraseHint: e.g. The chestnut tree in the yard
safety.noteHint: e.g. If someone calls in my name asking for money, ask for the passphrase first.

evacuation.title: Evacuation plan
evacuation.subtitle: The evacuation route, location of extinguishers, hydrants and exits, plus pet markers so firefighters know where to look.
evacuation.petsHint: Mark the pets in your apartment so firefighters know where to look during an evacuation.
evacuation.noMarker: Your apartment is not marked with pets.

F01.title: Official announcements
F01.description: Official announcements with read receipts and targeted delivery.

F02.title: Moderated discussion channel
F02.description: Discussion channel between residents, moderated by the committee.

F03.title: Building alert (emergency)
F03.description: Emergency broadcast that overrides quiet hours.

F04.title: Private messages to the administrator
F04.description: Private channel between a resident and the administrator.

F05.title: Anonymous message to the committee
F05.description: Message to the committee with hidden identity.

F06.title: Neighbor notices (board)
F06.description: Unofficial notices between neighbors, expiring after 14 days.

F07.title: Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
F07.description: Searchable FAQ maintained by the administrator.

F08.title: Events calendar
F08.description: Events calendar with RSVP and reminders.

F09.title: Quick vote on proposals
F09.description: Quick votes on proposals, with configurable quorum and majority.

F10.title: Digital general assembly
F10.description: Digital General Assembly compliant with Law 196/2018.

F11.title: Meeting minutes (archive)
F11.description: Searchable archive of signed meeting minutes.

F14.title: Idea box
F14.description: Open suggestions with voting, promoted quarterly.

F16.title: Internal petitions
F16.description: Petitions with signature gathering and a submission threshold.

F17.title: Issues with photos
F17.description: Report problems with photos and track their status.

F18.title: Repair history
F18.description: Searchable log of all major repairs.

F20.title: Meter readings
F20.description: Monthly index submission with a photo.

F22.title: Request for proposals (RFP)
F22.description: Request and compare bids from contractors.

F24.title: Lendable items list
F24.description: Tools and items that neighbors lend.

F25.title: Laundry booking
F25.description: Book slots for the shared laundry room.

F27.title: Common room / terrace booking
F27.description: Book the common room or terrace.

F28.title: Parking
F28.description: Parking spot registry with anonymous messaging.

F29.title: Bike room
F29.description: Registry of bikes in the shared room.

F30.title: Storage / annexes
F30.description: Registry of storage units and annexes.

F34.title: Suppliers / contracts
F34.description: Supplier catalog with contract expiry alerts.

F38.title: Wall of thanks
F38.description: Public wall of thanks between neighbors.

F40.title: Glossary of terms
F40.description: Definitions for terms from invoices and the general assembly.

F41.title: Project tracking
F41.description: Track major works: phases, budget, photos.

F43.title: Contractor library
F43.description: Library of vetted contractors, with ratings.

F46.title: Repair fund recommendations
F46.description: Calculator for the repair fund rate.

F49.title: Doorkeeper / trusted-neighbor codes
F49.description: Lists of trusted neighbors, stored encrypted.

F50.title: Evacuation plan
F50.description: Evacuation plans with markers for pets.

F53.title: Key register
F53.description: Who holds the keys to common areas.

F55.title: Alarm system (status)
F55.description: Status of the alarm / detection system.

F56.title: Localized emergency numbers
F56.description: Emergency numbers customized for the building.

F60.title: Service exchange
F60.description: Exchange of services and skills between neighbors.

consent.title: Privacy and cookies
consent.body: We use strictly necessary cookies to run the app and, only with your consent, optional ones for preferences, analytics and marketing.
consent.necessaryDesc: Authentication, security and basic preferences. These cannot be turned off.
consent.preferencesDesc: Remember optional choices such as your home layout and routine community notifications.
consent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand, in aggregate, how the app is used. Never to identify you.
consent.settingsSubtitle: Manage your consent and review the legal documents.
consent.historyEmpty: You have not recorded any choice yet.
consent.processingLink: Record of processing activities and DPA (administration)

gdpr.rightsSubtitle: Exercise your GDPR rights: download a copy of your data or request account deletion.
gdpr.exportBody: Receive a complete, machine-readable copy of all the personal data the platform holds about you (the rights of access and portability, GDPR art. 15 and 20).
gdpr.exported: A copy of your data was downloaded
gdpr.retentionBody: Each data category has a retention period and a lawful basis. Data is kept only as long as necessary.
gdpr.erasureBody: You can request deletion of your account (the right to be forgotten, GDPR art. 17). Some records are kept anonymized where the association has a legal or integrity obligation (vote validity, accounting), so deletion cannot rewrite history.
gdpr.erasurePlanTitle: What happens to your data on deletion
gdpr.erasureConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to request deletion of your account? Your personal data will be removed as described above. Some records may be retained in anonymized form where required by law. This action cannot be undone once the administrator processes it.
gdpr.erasureRequested: Your deletion request was sent to the administrator
gdpr.alreadyRequested: You already have a pending deletion request.
gdpr.myRequestsEmpty: You have not filed any request yet.

reason.profile: Your contact and profile data is fully deleted.
reason.marketplace: Your marketplace listings are fully deleted.
reason.tickets: Tickets remain for maintenance continuity, but without your identity.
reason.ideas: Ideas remain for context, but without your identity.
reason.listings: The listings and profiles you created are fully deleted.
reason.messages: Your messages remain for conversation continuity, but without your identity.
reason.petitions: Petitions you started remain for the residents who signed them, but without your identity.
reason.reports: Reports you submitted remain for safety continuity, but without your identity.
reason.votes: Votes are kept so adopted decisions stay valid (Law 196/2018).
reason.financial: Financial records are kept per accounting obligations.
reason.consent: Proof of consent is kept as a compliance obligation.
reason.security: The security log is kept to protect the account.

retain.community: Anonymized, for the lifetime of the content

gdpr.adminSubtitle: Action residents' export and deletion requests, with a full audit trail.
gdpr.noAccessBody: Only the association's administrator or president can manage personal-data requests.

breach.title: Personal-data breaches
breach.subtitle: Record personal-data breaches, assess the risk, and generate the notifications required by GDPR articles 33 and 34.
breach.noAccessBody: Only the association's admin or president can manage personal-data breaches.
breach.awaitingBanner_one: 1 breach awaiting the ANSPDCP notification within the 72-hour deadline.
breach.awaitingBanner_other: {{count}} breaches awaiting the ANSPDCP notification within the 72-hour deadline.
breach.fldTitlePh: e.g. unauthorised access to the contact list
breach.fldDescriptionPh: What happened, how the breach was discovered, and which data may be involved.
breach.fldConsequencesPh: e.g. risk of spam or fraud using the contact data
breach.fldMeasuresPh: e.g. revoke access, reset passwords, inform affected people

factorHint.sensitiveData: Financial, health or other special-category data.
factorHint.largeScale: A large number of people or records affected.
factorHint.identifiable: Affected people can be readily identified from the data.
factorHint.mitigated: The data was unintelligible (e.g. encrypted) or the risk was neutralised.

breach.needAuthorityAndSubjects: Requires notifying ANSPDCP and informing residents.

ropa.title: Data processing (DPA and register)
ropa.subtitle: The data processing agreement and the record of processing activities (GDPR art. 28 and 30).
ropa.noAccessBody: Only the association's administrator or president can view the data processing agreement and the record of processing activities.
ropa.dpaBody: The association is the data controller and vecini.online is the processor. This template agreement sets out each party's obligations and should be reviewed before adoption.
ropa.dpaDownloaded: The data processing agreement was downloaded
ropa.registerBody: Generated automatically from the association's enabled features: for each activity, what data it processes, on what basis, how long it is kept and who receives it.

retain.active: While the feature is active / the account exists

subjects.residents: residents, owners and tenants of the association

account.title: Account and authentication
account.purpose: Creating the account, authenticating and keeping the session to access the platform.

security.title: Security log
security.purpose: Recording security events (sign-ins, 2FA changes) to protect the account.

consent.title: Consent records
consent.purpose: Keeping proof of consent choices as a compliance obligation (art. 7).

dsr.title: Personal-data requests
dsr.purpose: Handling data subjects' export and erasure requests (art. 15-22).

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: History of changes in the association, with a tamper-evident chain
audit.noAccessBody: Only the admin or president can view the audit log.

chrome.helpBody: Contact the administrator or read the quick guide for your first steps.
chrome.footerTagline: The digital platform for your owners' association. Always at hand.

palette.emptyHint: Try a different word or phrase

userMenu.title: Account menu
userMenu.aboutDesc: What vecini.online is and which version you run
userMenu.helpDesc: Quick steps and answers to questions
userMenu.contactDesc: Write to us or reach your administrator
userMenu.aboutLead: Your community, all in one place.
userMenu.aboutBody: Announcements, decisions, tickets and documents, brought together in one clear, fast and secure space. Built for real trust between administrators and residents.
userMenu.helpLead: Not sure where to start? Here are a few pointers.
userMenu.helpTip1: Use the search bar at the top to quickly find any announcement, ticket or neighbour.
userMenu.helpTip2: Open the FAQ section for answers to the most common questions.
userMenu.helpTip3: For technical issues, write to us from the Contact section and we will get back to you shortly.
userMenu.contactLead: We are here for any question or suggestion.

login.title: Operator sign in
login.subtitle: Restricted to platform operators.
login.demoNotice: Demo mode — no backend configured. You enter the console with sample data.

access.deniedBody: This account is not a platform operator. If this is a mistake, contact another operator.

home.subtitle: The vecini.online platform console — manage associations, oversight and support, kept separate from the resident app.
home.liveMetricsNote: Live platform metrics appear as the console pages are activated.
home.demoBanner: Running in demo mode, with no backend. The data shown is sample data.

asociatii.title: Associations
asociatii.desc: List associations and create a new one, provisioning its first administrator.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.desc: View every association's tamper-evident log, aggregated platform-wide.

errors.title: App errors
errors.desc: Scrubbed error reports, so problems are spotted quickly.

usage.title: Usage & health
usage.desc: Each association's adoption and activity, to spot dormant associations.

impersonation.title: Audited impersonation
impersonation.desc: Enter an association's context read-only to diagnose; every entry is logged.

messenger.title: Admin messenger
messenger.desc: A two-way support thread between association admins and platform operators.

asociatii.title: Associations
asociatii.subtitle: List the platform's associations and provision a new one with its first administrator. The admin then onboards their residents through invite codes.
asociatii.provisionLead: Create the association and provision its first administrator's account. The operator does not add residents; the admin onboards them afterwards.

err.cui: Invalid tax ID (digits only, optional RO prefix)

asociatii.liveNote: Live provisioning creates the administrator's account through the platform's secure server (verified server-side).
asociatii.demoNote: In demo mode we generate a setup code you hand to the administrator to complete their account.
asociatii.empty: No associations yet. Provision the first one to get started.
asociatii.neverSignedIn: Administrator has not signed in yet
asociatii.linkExpiry: The link and code expire on {{date}}

addAsociatie.title: Add new association
addAsociatie.subtitle: Enter the administrator name and email address. They will receive an email with a setup link valid for 24 hours.
addAsociatie.formNote: The administrator fills in the association details (name, address, tax ID, etc.) in the onboarding wizard after accepting the invitation.
addAsociatie.sentNoteDemo: Demo mode - in the live app, the administrator receives the email with the setup link (valid for 24 hours).
addAsociatie.sentNoteLive: The administrator has received the email with the setup link (valid for 24 hours).
addAsociatie.sentNoteLiveNoEmail: Invitation created, but email could not be sent (Resend not configured). Set RESEND_API_KEY for automatic delivery.

err.notConfigured: Backend service is not configured. Check your Supabase environment variables.
err.provisionFailed: Error creating invitation. Check your configuration and try again.
err.forbidden: Access denied. Account does not have superadmin rights.

mfa.enrollBody: Platform operator accounts must have two-factor authentication (2FA) enabled before accessing the console. This protects the platform even if your password is compromised.
mfa.enrolledNotice: 2FA is mandatory for platform operators and cannot be disabled while the role is held.
